name: THE WATCHER
containment: SCP-7742 must be kept in complete darkness at all times. All illumination sources within 50m of containment must be removed or disabled. Any rhythmic clicking sounds from the containment cell are to be reported to Level-3 staff immediately.
description: An amorphous dark mass of undetermined volume containing between ██ and ███ photoreceptive organs. All organs appear fully functional and track movement independently. Subject emits a rhythmic clicking when under active observation. Purpose of the sound is [DATA EXPUNGED].
addendum: Note: SCP-7742 has demonstrated the ability to ████████ within its containment cell without triggering motion sensors. Method of locomotion remains unknown.
